name: python3-markdown-it
title: python3-markdown-it
summary: Python port of markdown-it and some its associated plugins
description:
Python port of markdown-it and some its associated plugins
High speed Python markdown parser based in markdown-it. markdown-it-py
follows the CommonMark spec for baseline parsing. Also, new syntax
rules can be added and even replace existing ones. New syntax extensions
can be added to extend the parser.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use markdown-it because Python port of markdown-it and some its associated plugins.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use markdown-it as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `markdown-it [OPTIONS] [FILE...]` as documented upstream for markdown-it.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `markdown-it --stdin [OPTIONS]` as documented upstream for markdown-it.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `markdown-it README.md > README.html` as documented upstream for markdown-it.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `markdown-it header.md body.md footer.md > page.html` as documented upstream for markdown-it.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair markdown-it with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `markdown-it --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: markdown-it - parse Markdown and write HTML
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install markdown-it-py. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `markdown-it [OPTIONS] [FILE...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `markdown-it --stdin [OPTIONS]`; `markdown-it README.md > README.html`. Python port of markdown-it and some its associated plugins.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python port of markdown-it and some its associated plugins.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: markdown-it - parse Markdown and write HTML.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install markdown-it-py
Install with: sudo apt install markdown-it-py
